name: CMS: AI-Supported Actions Retained
description: AI-supported official actions and AI-generated content are retained per records-retention and FOIA requirements.
rationale: CMS BR-AI-6: AI-supported official actions are subject to records retention requirements; AI-generated content may be subject to data retention and FOIA.

examples.passes: the CMS AI rule's evidence is present

source: CMS Technical Reference Architecture (TRA) — Artificial Intelligence Guidance (Business Rules BR-AI-1..6 and recommended practices; references OMB M-25-21/M-25-22, NIST AI RMF, HHS AI policy). https://www.cms.gov/tra/Foundation/FD_0080_Foundation_AI_Guidance.htm
